# dear-agent

> Software engineering infrastructure for AI agents.
> Repository: https://github.com/vbonnet/dear-agent
> License: Apache 2.0

## Overview

dear-agent is a meta-harness for AI coding agents. It provides the session
lifecycle, sandbox isolation, persistent memory, and multi-agent orchestration
that production-grade AI-assisted development requires.

The core philosophy is DEAR: Define, Enforce, Audit, Resolve. Every rule is
written down, enforced automatically, audited continuously, and when things
break, we fix the infrastructure — not the agent.

Supported AI CLIs: Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI, OpenCode CLI — all
behind a unified adapter interface.

## Products

### AGM (Agent Gateway Manager)

Session lifecycle management for AI coding agents. Create, resume, archive,
and monitor sessions with persistent metadata and state tracking.

**Location**: `agm/cmd/agm`

```bash
go install github.com/vbonnet/dear-agent/agm/cmd/agm@latest

agm session new my-feature     # Create isolated session
agm session list               # List active sessions
agm session send my-feature "run the tests"
agm session archive my-feature # Clean up
```

Key capabilities:
- Sandbox isolation (OverlayFS on Linux, APFS on macOS)
- Multi-agent orchestration with async message delivery
- State detection chain: hooks → tmux → manual
- Harness-agnostic adapter pattern (one interface per AI CLI)
- Three API surfaces (CLI, MCP server, Skills) sharing one operations layer

### Engram (Persistent Memory)

Cue-based memory retrieval for AI sessions. Memories are stored with
contextual cues and retrieved by relevance, giving agents persistent
context across conversations.

**Location**: `engram/cmd/engram`

```bash
go install github.com/vbonnet/dear-agent/engram/cmd/engram@latest
```

### Wayfinder (Workflow Engine)

Structured SDLC workflow with nine phases and validation gates. Guides
work from scoping through release with defined entry/exit criteria.

**Location**: `wayfinder/`

## Architecture

```
CLI / MCP Server / Skills
        │
  Shared Operations Layer (internal/ops/)
        │
  Harness Adapter Registry (internal/agent/)
  ┌─────────┬─────────┬─────────┬───────────┐
  │ Claude  │ Gemini  │ Codex   │ OpenCode  │
  └─────────┴─────────┴─────────┴───────────┘
        │
  Backend Abstraction (tmux / temporal)
        │
  Storage & Coordination (DB, Manifests, Queue, Sandbox)
```

## Key Packages

| Package | Import Path | Purpose |
|---------|-------------|---------|
| enforcement | `pkg/enforcement` | Anti-pattern detection with compiled regex |
| eventbus | `pkg/eventbus` | Four-channel event bus with delivery guarantees |
| security | `pkg/security` | Path validation and sandbox enforcement |
| workflow | `pkg/workflow` | YAML DAG engine with retry and crash recovery |
| costtrack | `pkg/costtrack` | Token pricing across LLM providers |
| llm | `pkg/llm` | Unified LLM provider routing interface |
| monitoring | `pkg/monitoring` | Sub-agent monitoring and validation scoring |
| validation | `pkg/validation` | Frontmatter and structure validators |
| promptcache | `pkg/promptcache` | Claude API cache control |
| benchmark | `pkg/benchmark` | Statistical benchmarking (t-tests, effect sizes) |

## Build

```bash
go build ./...
go test ./...
golangci-lint run ./...
```

Requires Go 1.25+, tmux, and Git.
